Bug / Task Description: Optimize the Merkle tree in pkg/merkle so it rebuilds lazily and supports batch inserts, without changing its hashing semantics. Put and Delete must defer hash/root recomputation until a hash is actually read, while Len and the root hash stay consistent with the previous eager behavior. Add a PutBatch method that applies many key/value pairs at once and produces a tree identical to the same sequential Puts (including overwrites and the empty-batch case). Diff must remain correct after a lazy rebuild, and add a FastDiff routine that pkg/sim network reconciliation uses to compute the same OnlyLocal/OnlyRemote/Different result as Diff. Keep all existing public behavior intact.
Commit Subject: fix(perf): optimize merkle tree - lazy rebuild, batch insert, FastDiff in sim
